title: zdgx-AutoUpdateMod
body:
这个mod可以用来自动更新和下载mc的mod，适用于整合包更新或者服务器更新。

mod第一次运行会在游戏目录下的zdgx文件夹创建json.json在address输入更新地址即可更新。

更新地址请用下载链接（如[链接](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/raw/main/json.json)）,内容为mod信息json，如[链接](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/blob/main/json.json)

mod列表应在filename输入mod的文件名，在download输入mod的下载地址（如[链接](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/raw/main/yunxing.jar)）

如果有bug问题错误等请在Github的issues中提交。

其他mod制作者可以将本mod当做插件集成[集成方法](https://github.com/z2bguoguo/zdgxmc/wiki/%E5%BD%93%E4%BD%9C%E6%8F%92%E4%BB%B6%E9%9B%86%E6%88%90%E6%9C%ACmod)。

如果服务器也安装了本模组则支持在加入服务器的时候获取服务器提供的链接来更新模组

因为forge服务器通信有些技术问题所以目前仅支持fabric

本mod支持安装插件，插件的制作方法请参照"zhixing"源码

[Youtube教程](https://youtu.be/wNNw7qTQd7g)
[bilibili教程](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV13Y4y1u7aK/)

This mod can be used to automatically update and download MC mods, for pack updates or server updates.

The first run of the mod will create Json. json in the game directory ZDGX folder.

To update the address, please use the download link [link](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/raw/main/json.json), the content is the mod information JSON, such as [link](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/blob/main/json.json)
.

The list of mods should be in filename enter the name of the mod and in download enter the location to download the mod [link](http://github.com/z2bguoguo/mczdgx/raw/main/yunxing.jar).

If there are bugs, problems or errors, please submit them in the Issues section of Github.

Other mod makers can integrate this mod as a plugin[link](https://github.com/z2bguoguo/zdgxmc/wiki/%E5%BD%93%E4%BD%9C%E6%8F%92%E4%BB%B6%E9%9B%86%E6%88%90%E6%9C%ACmod)

If THE SERVER also HAS THIS module INSTALLED, it is supported to obtain the link provided by the server to update the module when joining the server

Due to technical issues with FORGE server communication, only Fabric is currently supported

The MOD supports the installation of plug-ins, plug-ins production method please refer to "Zhixing" source
[Youtube tutorial](https://youtu.be/wNNw7qTQd7g)
[bilibili tutorial](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV13Y4y1u7aK/)
